recommendations.title: I Am Not an Easy Man
recommendations.overview: The chauvinist Damien wakes up in a world where women and men have their roles reversed in society, and everything is dominated by women.

recommendations.title: Swing Girls
recommendations.overview: A group of delinquent high school girls form a band when they accidentally poison their school's brass band and have to replace them.

recommendations.title: Ms .45
recommendations.overview: After being attacked and raped twice in one day, a timid, mute seamstress becomes a violent agent of revenge for wronged women.

recommendations.title: Moving On
recommendations.overview: Two old friends reconnect at their friend's funeral, and decide to exact revenge on the widower who wronged all three of them decades earlier.

recommendations.title: Rooster Cogburn
recommendations.overview: After a band of drunken thugs overruns a small Indian Nation town, killing Reverend Goodnight and raping the women folk, Eula Goodnight enlists the aid of US Marshal Cogburn to hunt them down and bring her father's killers to justice.

recommendations.title: Le Brio
recommendations.overview: After an incident, a brilliant professor known for his outbursts is forced to mentor the student he wronged for a speech contest.

recommendations.title: Ma che colpa abbiamo noi
recommendations.overview: Seven people in a therapy group are forced to find new ways of coping with their problems when their therapist dies in the middle of a session.

recommendations.title: A Score to Settle
recommendations.overview: A former mob enforcer who is released from prison after serving 22 years for a crime he didn't commit sets out on a path for revenge against the people who wronged him.

recommendations.title: Art of the Devil 2
recommendations.overview: A beautiful teacher is wronged by six of her students. Calling on demons and forces of black magic, she extracts an ultra-gruesome retribution against each of them.
recommendations.director: Yossapong Phonsup, Kongkiat Khomsiri, Pasith Buranajan, Putipong Saisikaew, Isara Nadee, Art Thamthrakul, Seree Phongnithi

recommendations.title: Pray Away
recommendations.overview: In the 1970s, five men struggling with being gay in their Evangelical church started a bible study to help each other leave the "homosexual lifestyle." They quickly received over 25,000 letters from people asking for help and formalized as Exodus Int
